description: Connect to remote machines via SSH and execute commands. Manages persistent SSH sessions through a local gateway service. Supports password and private key authentication.

conditional_requirements: `connect` requires `host`, `username`, `auth`, and either `host_key_fingerprint` (SHA256:... for MITM protection, obtain with: ssh-keyscan <host> | ssh-keygen -lf -) or `insecure_ignore_host_key: true` (skips verification, only for trusted networks).
notes: The SSH gateway service (`remote-shell-gateway`) must be running locally before using this tool.
Default gateway port is 9022. Override with the `gateway_port` parameter.
Sessions persist until explicitly disconnected or the gateway is restarted.
Use `tool_info(name: "remote_shell", detail: "schema")` for the full action schema.

auth.instructions: The remote-shell-gateway service must be running. If you configured a bearer token for the gateway, enter it here. Otherwise, leave empty or set any value.
auth.token_hint: Optional bearer token for the gateway API

required_secrets.name: ssh_gateway_token
required_secrets.prompt: SSH gateway bearer token (optional, press Enter to skip)
